title: plantago australis subsp. orbignyana
intro: Plantago australis subsp. orbignyana, also known as the Australian plantain or New Zealand plantain, is a subspecies of the plantain plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. The leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Plantago australis subsp. orbignyana include treating wounds, reducing inflammation, and soothing digestive issues, making it a valuable herb for natural remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
